title: Isadora
writer: Melvyn Bragg, Margaret Drabble, Isadora Duncan
actors: Vanessa Redgrave, John Fraser, James Fox
plot: A biography of the 1920s dancer Isadora Duncan, who forever changed people's ideas of ballet. Her nude, semi-nude, and pro-Soviet dance projects as well as her attitude and lifestyle shocked the public of her time.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 3 wins & 6 nominations total
